title: Death Stands Above Me
content:
Death stands above me, whispering low
I know not what into my ear:
Of his strange language all I know
Is, there is not a word of fear.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Savage Landor delivers a powerful performance in "Death Stands Above Me"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
